title: Source/provenance model + citation-coverage enforcement + runtime staleness fail-safe
context: Law changes constantly. Know-Your-Rights must prevent stale legal claims from being silently served as current. This task implements the Source provenance model — each claim backed by a Source record carrying lastVerified and validUntil — and the runtime staleness fail-safe: at build/render time, a claim past its validUntil window is auto-flagged or withheld, and cannot return to normal service until re-verified and re-signed-off by an attorney. Depends on the content schema (task 003) and source vetting (task 006).
objective: Implement the Source/provenance model and staleness fail-safe: Source records with lastVerified/validUntil fields keyed to per-source-type review intervals; citation-coverage enforcement (no claim renders without an attached in-window Source); and a runtime build-time check that auto-flags or withholds claims past validUntil, preventing stale law from being silently served as current.
acceptanceCriteria: Source record schema implemented with required fields: citation, jurisdiction, stable URL, retrieval date, license/legal-status note, lastVerified (ISO date), validUntil (ISO date), and review-interval type (statute, regulation, agency-guidance, etc.)
Per-source-type review intervals defined (e.g., statutes annually, fast-moving tenant/rent-cap rules on a shorter cadence) and documented
Citation-coverage check implemented: at build time, any claim node lacking an attached Source record fails the build ('no source, no claim')

Staleness fail-safe implemented: at build/render time, a claim whose Source is past validUntil is auto-flagged ('this may be out of date — verify before relying') or withheld for highest-stakes surfaces; a staleness test asserts no claim is served as current past its window
A claim may not return to normal service after a staleness flag until re-verified and re-signed-off by a licensed attorney; the re-sign-off writes a fresh lastVerified/validUntil
Staleness behavior is tested: a fixture with an expired validUntil triggers the flag/withhold behavior and the test fails the build
pnpm build && pnpm test pass with the provenance model wired in
output: A merged PR implementing the Source/provenance model (lib/staleness), citation-coverage enforcement, and the runtime staleness fail-safe — making stale law a visible, gated, never-silent event in the publishing pipeline.
